title: Temple Relics
description: Abandoned structures throughout your world can now contain ancient relics with powerful abilities.
body:
The Temple Relics datapack adds new unique and powerful relics to the structures throughout your Minecraft world!

These ancient Relics can be found in abandonded structures around the world. When you find a relic out in the world, it will be unactivated. The relic is useless until you obtain its corresponding gem.|![Three Unactivated Relics](https://i.imgur.com/E9ROP4p.png)
---|---

![A Creeper Relic Gem](https://gamingbarn.net/images/download_page/tr/description/images/creeper_relic_gem.png)|You can activate the Relics by using Relic Gems. These gems are dropped by the relic variants of the mob portrayed in the relic. These mobs have a chance to spawn in-place of their regular, vanilla mob counterpart.
---|---

To slot the gem into the relic, simply right click with the relic while the relic gem is in your inventory. Each Relic has two abilities. You can activate the abilities by right-clicking, or sneaking **AND** right-clicking.|![An Activated Guardian Relic](https://gamingbarn.net/images/download_page/tr/description/images/activated_guardian_relic.png)
---|---
